title: Even AI setups get stopped out sometimes, and that’s a part of the trading process.
author: Kind_Shop_3846
selftext:
Had this setup today on FinRadar that was generated by an AI with around 85% confidence. Everything looked perfect with a clean entry, solid direction and good structure.

But it still hit the stop loss before moving exactly as predicted.

It’s a good reminder that even when the analysis makes total sense, the market can still do its own thing. Getting stopped out doesn’t mean the setup was wrong, it’s just part of trading.
